arts.ttl: Crystal Palace embarrassed Manchester United last season - but Erik ten Hag has a trick up his sleeve
arts.sum: Man Utd were hammered 4-0 by Crystal Palace away from home last term and must right the wrongs of that night.

arts.ttl: Manchester United predicted line up vs Crystal Palace as Alejandro Garnacho decision made
arts.sum: Man United will be targeting back-to-back Premier League wins for the first time this season when they face Crystal Palace on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Four goals, three players, two positions - Man United dilemma facing Erik ten Hag vs Crystal Palace
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Tyrone Marshall, George Smith, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Man United manager Erik ten Hag must decide who occupies the two wide berths for Saturday's clash with Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Sir Jim Ratcliffe considers U-turn as Erik ten Hag handed double injury boost
arts.sum: Manchester United go into their Premier League game against Crystal Palace on the back of two straight wins - and have two key players back in contention after injuries

arts.ttl: Ex-Arsenal icon who rejected Man Utd accuses stars of "hiding" behind Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: French World Cup winner Emmanuel Petit, 53, hasn't held back in his view of some of Manchester United's big hitters in relation to their under-pressure manager Erik ten Hag

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Man Utd to go head-to-head in transfer battle for Bournemouth star
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester United are on a collision course as they both seek long-term replacements for their respective left-backs, according to reports. arts.ttl: Club chief reveals failed move for Man Utd midfielder
arts.sum: Manchester United midfielder Christian Eriksen has been confirmed as a recent summer target for Anderlecht by the Belgian club's chief executive for sport. Eriksen has admitted that he would have been open to leaving Old Trafford if the club had told him there were no prospects for him at United .

arts.ttl: Anthony Martial breaks silence on move after making Man Utd feelings VERY clear
arts.sum: Anthony Martial has finally found a new club after spending the last few months unemployed following his Manchester United exit and has now spoken out after putting pen to paper on a move

arts.ttl: Preview: Crystal Palace vs. Manchester United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Premier League clash between Crystal Palace and Manchester United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
